purpose: Record reusable acquisition routes for every PR-130 expected country/system group so data collection does not restart from scratch on the next update.

routes.reusable_next_step: Promote the month-specific manual extraction into a parser that reads the annual calendar and filters by YYYY-MM.
Run scripts/extract-pr-130-nar-june.mjs with ALLOW_LIVE_SOURCE_FETCH=1 to generate the month record set from the NAR monthly convene route.
Promote the month-specific manual extraction into a parser that reads the race schedule and filters by YYYY-MM.
Promote the month-specific fixture query into a parameterized HKJC month extractor using calmonth and calyear.
Keep the month status route and only add meeting records when the official season calendar shows June meetings.
Promote the PDF month extraction into a reusable BHA fixture-list parser that filters the annual PDF by YYYY-MM.
